You are a senior full-stack mobile app developer.

I have an existing web app (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) for a fabric shop management system. The app includes:
- Product management (add/edit/delete)
- Sales tracking system
- Profit calculation
- Dashboard with daily and total stats
- Reports by month and product
- Local storage-based database
- Backup/restore JSON system
- CSV export
- Bengali (Bangla) UI

Your task:

1. Convert this web app into a modern mobile application using React Native (Expo preferred).
2. Maintain all existing features and logic.
3. Improve UI/UX to look like a professional mobile app (clean cards, smooth navigation, bottom tabs).
4. Replace localStorage with AsyncStorage or SQLite for better mobile performance.
5. Add the following enhancements:
   - Splash screen
   - App icon
   - Offline-first data handling
   - Better form validation
   - Toast notifications instead of alerts
   - Dark theme (keep current design style)
6. Organize code into proper structure:
   - components/
   - screens/
   - services/
   - storage/
7. Ensure the app works on both Android and iOS.
8. Add instructions to build APK using Expo.

Important:
- Keep Bangla language support
- Optimize performance for low-end Android devices
- Avoid unnecessary libraries

Here is my existing code:
"<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="bn">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>FabricGhar</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+Bengali:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg: #0f0f13;
  --surface: #1a1a22;
  --surface2: #22222e;
  --border: #2e2e3e;
  --accent: #f5a623;
  --accent2: #e85d75;
  --green: #2ecc71;
  --red: #e74c3c;
  --blue: #3498db;
  --text: #f0f0f5;
  --text2: #9090aa;
  --radius: 12px;
  --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body { font-family: 'Noto Serif Bengali', sans-serif; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); min-height: 100vh; }
.app { max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 0 80px; }
/* Header */
.header { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a22 0%, #12121a 100%); padding: 20px 16px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; }
.header-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.header h1 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); }
.header-date { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text2); }
.btn-new-sale { background: var(--accent); color: #000; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }
.btn-new-sale:active { opacity: 0.85; }
/* Bottom Nav */
.bottom-nav { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: var(--surface); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; z-index: 50; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 100%; }
.nav-item { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 10px 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; color: var(--text2); font-family: inherit; font-size: 10px; gap: 4px; }
.nav-item.active { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-icon { font-size: 20px; }
/* Sections */
.section { display: none; padding: 16px; }
.section.active { display: block; }
/* Cards */
.summary-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.sum-card { background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.sum-card .label { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.sum-card .val { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; }
.val.green { color: var(--green); }
.val.blue { color: var(--blue); }
.val.red { color: var(--red); }
.val.amber { color: var(--accent); }
/* Section Title */
.sec-title { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.sec-title h3 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text2); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
/* Table Card */
.table-card { background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border); overflow: hidden; }
.t-row { display: grid; padding: 12px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 14px; }
.t-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.t-row.header-row { background: var(--surface2); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text2); font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; }
.t-row.product-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 8px; align-items: center; }
.t-row.sale-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 8px; }
.product-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; }
.product-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text2); margin-top: 2px; }
.product-right { text-align: right; }
.product-price { font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); }
.product-stock { font-size: 12px; margin-top: 2px; }
.badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; }
.badge.green { background: rgba(46,204,113,0.15); color: var(--green); }
.badge.red { background: rgba(231,76,60,0.15); color: var(--red); }
.badge.amber { background: rgba(245,166,35,0.15); color: var(--accent); }
.edit-btn { background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; margin-top: 4px; }
.empty { text-align: center; padding: 40px 20px; color: var(--text2); font-size: 14px; }
/* Modal */
.backdrop { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); z-index: 100; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; }
.backdrop.open { display: flex; }
.modal { background: var(--surface); border-radius: 20px 20px 0 0; padding: 20px 16px 32px; width: 100%; max-width: 480px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; }
.modal-handle { width: 40px; height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 4px; margin: 0 auto 16px; }
.modal h3 { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.form-group { margin-bottom: 12px; }
.form-group label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text2); display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.form-group input, .form-group select { width: 100%; background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); padding: 11px 13px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 15px; }
.form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); }
.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }
.modal-btns { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; }
.btn-cancel { flex: 1; background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); padding: 13px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; }
.btn-submit { flex: 2; background: var(--accent); color: #000; border: none; padding: 13px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
/* Report */
.report-block { background: var(--surface); border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 14px; overflow: hidden; }
.report-title { background: var(--surface2); padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text2); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
.report-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 11px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 14px; }
.report-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.report-row .key { color: var(--text2); }
.report-row .val2 { font-weight: 600; }
/* Filter */
.filter-bar { margin-bottom: 12px; }
.filter-bar select { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; width: 100%; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
  <div class="header">
    <div class="header-top">
      <h1 style="line-height:0"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="ফেব্রিক ঘর" style="height:38px;object-fit:contain;"></h1>
      <button class="btn-new-sale" onclick="openSaleModal()">+ বিক্রয়</button>
    </div>
    <div class="header-date" id="hdate"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Dashboard -->
  <div id="tab-dashboard" class="section active">
    <div class="summary-grid" id="sum-cards"></div>
    <div class="sec-title"><h3>আজকের বিক্রয়</h3></div>
    <div id="today-list"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Products -->
  <div id="tab-products" class="section">
    <div class="sec-title">
      <h3>পণ্য তালিকা</h3>
      <button class="btn-new-sale" onclick="openProductModal()">+ যোগ করুন</button>
    </div>
    <div id="product-list"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sales -->
  <div id="tab-sales" class="section">
    <div class="sec-title"><h3>বিক্রয় ইতিহাস</h3></div>
    <div class="filter-bar">
      <select id="month-filter" onchange="renderSales()">
        <option value="">সব মাস</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div id="sales-list"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Report -->
  <div id="tab-report" class="section">
    <div class="sec-title"><h3>হিসাব রিপোর্ট</h3></div>
    <div id="report-content"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Bottom Nav -->
  <nav class="bottom-nav">
    <button class="nav-item active" onclick="switchTab('dashboard',this)">
      <span class="nav-icon">🏠</span><span>হোম</span>
    </button>
    <button class="nav-item" onclick="switchTab('products',this)">
      <span class="nav-icon">👗</span><span>পণ্য</span>
    </button>
    <button class="nav-item" onclick="switchTab('sales',this)">
      <span class="nav-icon">🧾</span><span>বিক্রয়</span>
    </button>
    <button class="nav-item" onclick="switchTab('report',this)">
      <span class="nav-icon">📊</span><span>রিপোর্ট</span>
    </button>
  </nav>
</div>

<!-- Product Modal -->
<div class="backdrop" id="prod-modal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-handle"></div>
    <h3 id="prod-modal-title">নতুন পণ্য যোগ করুন</h3>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>পণ্যের নাম</label>
      <input id="p-name" placeholder="যেমন: শাড়ি, কুর্তি, পাঞ্জাবি...">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>ক্যাটাগরি</label>
      <select id="p-cat">
        <option>3 পিস</option><option>শাড়ি</option><option>সালোয়ার কামিজ</option><option>কুর্তি</option>
        <option>পাঞ্জাবি</option><option>শার্ট</option><option>প্যান্ট</option>
        <option>শিশু পোশাক</option><option>অন্যান্য</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>ক্রয় মূল্য (৳)</label>
        <input id="p-buy" type="number" placeholder="0">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>বিক্রয় মূল্য (৳)</label>
        <input id="p-sell" type="number" placeholder="0">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>স্টক পরিমাণ</label>
      <input id="p-stock" type="number" placeholder="0">
    </div>
    <div class="modal-btns">
      <button class="btn-cancel" onclick="closeModal('prod-modal')">বাতিল</button>
      <button class="btn-submit" onclick="saveProduct()">সংরক্ষণ করুন</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Sale Modal -->
<div class="backdrop" id="sale-modal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-handle"></div>
    <h3>নতুন বিক্রয়</h3>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>পণ্য</label>
      <select id="s-prod" onchange="fillSalePrice()"></select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>পরিমাণ</label>
        <input id="s-qty" type="number" value="1" oninput="calcTotal()">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>একক মূল্য (৳)</label>
        <input id="s-price" type="number" oninput="calcTotal()">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>ছাড় (৳)</label>
        <input id="s-disc" type="number" value="0" oninput="calcTotal()">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>মোট (৳)</label>
        <input id="s-total" readonly style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>নোট</label>
      <input id="s-note" placeholder="ক্রেতার নাম বা তথ্য...">
    </div>
    <div class="modal-btns">
      <button class="btn-cancel" onclick="closeModal('sale-modal')">বাতিল</button>
      <button class="btn-submit" onclick="saveSale()">বিক্রয় সম্পন্ন ✓</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
let products = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dp') || '[]');
let sales = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ds') || '[]');
let editId = null;

const save = () => {
  localStorage.setItem('dp', JSON.stringify(products));
  localStorage.setItem('ds', JSON.stringify(sales));
};
const fmt = n => Number(n).toLocaleString('bn-BD');
const tk = n => '৳' + fmt(n);

document.getElementById('hdate').textContent = new Date().toLocaleDateString('bn-BD', {weekday:'long',year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'});

function switchTab(t, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.section').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('tab-' + t).classList.add('active');
  if(el) el.classList.add('active');
  if(t==='dashboard') renderDashboard();
  if(t==='products') renderProducts();
  if(t==='sales') { fillMonthFilter(); renderSales(); }
  if(t==='report') renderReport();
}

function renderDashboard() {
  const today = new Date().toDateString();
  const ts = sales.filter(s => new Date(s.date).toDateString() === today);
  const tr = ts.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.total,0);
  const tp = ts.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.profit,0);
  const ar = sales.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.total,0);
  const ap = sales.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.profit,0);
  const low = products.filter(p=>p.stock<=5).length;
  document.getElementById('sum-cards').innerHTML = `
    <div class="sum-card"><div class="label">আজকের বিক্রয়</div><div class="val blue">${tk(tr)}</div></div>
    <div class="sum-card"><div class="label">আজকের লাভ</div><div class="val green">${tk(tp)}</div></div>
    <div class="sum-card"><div class="label">মোট বিক্রয়</div><div class="val blue">${tk(ar)}</div></div>
    <div class="sum-card"><div class="label">মোট লাভ</div><div class="val green">${tk(ap)}</div></div>
    <div class="sum-card"><div class="label">মোট পণ্য</div><div class="val amber">${products.length}</div></div>
    <div class="sum-card"><div class="label">কম স্টক</div><div class="val ${low>0?'red':'amber'}">${low} টি</div></div>
  `;
  if(!ts.length) { document.getElementById('today-list').innerHTML='<div class="empty">আজ এখনো কোনো বিক্রয় নেই।<br>উপরের "+ বিক্রয়" বাটনে ক্লিক করুন।</div>'; return; }
  document.getElementById('today-list').innerHTML = `<div class="table-card">${ts.slice().reverse().map(s=>`
    <div class="t-row sale-row">
      <div><div class="product-name">${s.pname}</div><div class="product-meta">${s.qty} পিস × ${tk(s.price)} ${s.note?'· '+s.note:''}</div></div>
      <div class="product-right"><div class="product-price">${tk(s.total)}</div><div class="product-stock"><span class="badge green">লাভ: ${tk(s.profit)}</span></div></div>
    </div>`).join('')}</div>`;
}

function renderProducts() {
  if(!products.length) { document.getElementById('product-list').innerHTML='<div class="empty">কোনো পণ্য নেই।<br>উপরের "+ যোগ করুন" বাটনে ক্লিক করুন।</div>'; return; }
  document.getElementById('product-list').innerHTML = `<div class="table-card">${products.map(p=>{
    const sc = p.stock<=0?'red':p.stock<=5?'amber':'green';
    return `<div class="t-row product-row">
      <div>
        <div class="product-name">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="product-meta">${p.cat} · ক্রয়: ${tk(p.buy)}</div>
        <button class="edit-btn" onclick="openProductModal('${p.id}')">✏️ সম্পাদনা</button>
      </div>
      <div class="product-right">
        <div class="product-price">${tk(p.sell)}</div>
        <div class="product-stock"><span class="badge ${sc}">${fmt(p.stock)} পিস</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('')}</div>`;
}

function fillMonthFilter() {
  const months = [...new Set(sales.map(s=>{ const d=new Date(s.date); return d.getFullYear()+'-'+(d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0'); }))].sort().reverse();
  const sel = document.getElementById('month-filter');
  const cur = sel.value;
  sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">সব মাস</option>' + months.map(m=>{
    const [y,mo]=m.split('-');
    const lbl=new Date(y,mo-1).toLocaleDateString('bn-BD',{year:'numeric',month:'long'});
    return `<option value="${m}" ${cur===m?'selected':''}>${lbl}</option>`;
  }).join('');
}

function renderSales() {
  const f = document.getElementById('month-filter').value;
  let list = sales.slice().reverse();
  if(f) list = list.filter(s=>{ const d=new Date(s.date); return (d.getFullYear()+'-'+(d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0'))===f; });
  if(!list.length) { document.getElementById('sales-list').innerHTML='<div class="empty">কোনো বিক্রয় পাওয়া যায়নি।</div>'; return; }
  document.getElementById('sales-list').innerHTML = `<div class="table-card">${list.map(s=>`
    <div class="t-row sale-row">
      <div><div class="product-name">${s.pname}</div><div class="product-meta">${new Date(s.date).toLocaleDateString('bn-BD')} · ${s.qty} পিস ${s.note?'· '+s.note:''}</div></div>
      <div class="product-right"><div class="product-price">${tk(s.total)}</div><span class="badge green">৳${fmt(s.profit)}</span></div>
    </div>`).join('')}</div>`;
}

function renderReport() {
  const byMonth = {};
  const byProd = {};
  sales.forEach(s=>{
    const d=new Date(s.date), k=d.getFullYear()+'-'+(d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0');
    if(!byMonth[k]) byMonth[k]={rev:0,profit:0,count:0};
    byMonth[k].rev+=s.total; byMonth[k].profit+=s.profit; byMonth[k].count++;
    if(!byProd[s.pname]) byProd[s.pname]={rev:0,profit:0,qty:0};
    byProd[s.pname].rev+=s.total; byProd[s.pname].profit+=s.profit; byProd[s.pname].qty+=s.qty;
  });
  const tr=sales.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.total,0), tp=sales.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.profit,0);
  const tc=sales.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.buy*s.qty,0);
  const months=Object.keys(byMonth).sort().reverse();
  const topP=Object.entries(byProd).sort((a,b)=>b[1].profit-a[1].profit).slice(0,8);
  document.getElementById('report-content').innerHTML = `
    <div class="report-block">
      <div class="report-title">সামগ্রিক হিসাব</div>
      <div class="report-row"><span class="key">মোট বিক্রয়</span><span class="val2" style="color:var(--blue)">${tk(tr)}</span></div>
      <div class="report-row"><span class="key">মোট খরচ</span><span class="val2" style="color:var(--red)">${tk(tc)}</span></div>
      <div class="report-row"><span class="key">মোট লাভ</span><span class="val2" style="color:var(--green)">${tk(tp)}</span></div>
      <div class="report-row"><span class="key">লাভের হার</span><span class="val2" style="color:var(--accent)">${tr>0?Math.round(tp/tr*100):0}%</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="report-block">
      <div class="report-title">মাস অনুযায়ী</div>
      ${months.length?months.map(m=>{
        const {rev,profit,count}=byMonth[m],[y,mo]=m.split('-');
        const lbl=new Date(y,mo-1).toLocaleDateString('bn-BD',{month:'long',year:'numeric'});
        return `<div class="report-row"><span class="key">${lbl}<br><small>${count} টি বিক্রয়</small></span><span class="val2"><span style="color:var(--blue)">${tk(rev)}</span><br><small style="color:var(--green)">লাভ: ${tk(profit)}</small></span></div>`;
      }).join(''):'<div class="report-row"><span class="key" style="width:100%;text-align:center">কোনো তথ্য নেই</span></div>'}
    </div>
    <div class="report-block">
      <div class="report-title">সেরা পণ্য (লাভ অনুযায়ী)</div>
      ${topP.length?topP.map(([n,d])=>`
        <div class="report-row"><span class="key">${n}<br><small>${fmt(d.qty)} পিস বিক্রি</small></span><span class="val2"><span style="color:var(--accent)">${tk(d.rev)}</span><br><small style="color:var(--green)">লাভ: ${tk(d.profit)}</small></span></div>
      `).join(''):'<div class="report-row"><span class="key" style="width:100%;text-align:center">কোনো তথ্য নেই</span></div>'}
    </div>`;
}

function openProductModal(id=null) {
  editId=id;
  document.getElementById('prod-modal-title').textContent = id?'পণ্য সম্পাদনা':'নতুন পণ্য যোগ করুন';
  if(id){ const p=products.find(x=>x.id===id); document.getElementById('p-name').value=p.name; document.getElementById('p-cat').value=p.cat; document.getElementById('p-buy').value=p.buy; document.getElementById('p-sell').value=p.sell; document.getElementById('p-stock').value=p.stock; }
  else { ['p-name','p-buy','p-sell','p-stock'].forEach(i=>document.getElementById(i).value=''); document.getElementById('p-cat').selectedIndex=0; }
  document.getElementById('prod-modal').classList.add('open');
}

function saveProduct() {
  const name=document.getElementById('p-name').value.trim();
  if(!name){alert('পণ্যের নাম দিন');return;}
  const d={name,cat:document.getElementById('p-cat').value,buy:+document.getElementById('p-buy').value||0,sell:+document.getElementById('p-sell').value||0,stock:+document.getElementById('p-stock').value||0};
  if(editId){ Object.assign(products.find(x=>x.id===editId),d); }
  else { products.push({id:Date.now().toString(),...d}); }
  save(); closeModal('prod-modal'); renderProducts();
}

function openSaleModal() {
  if(!products.length){alert('আগে পণ্য যোগ করুন');return;}
  const sel=document.getElementById('s-prod');
  sel.innerHTML=products.map(p=>`<option value="${p.id}">${p.name} (স্টক: ${p.stock})</option>`).join('');
  fillSalePrice(); document.getElementById('s-qty').value=1; document.getElementById('s-disc').value=0; document.getElementById('s-note').value='';
  document.getElementById('sale-modal').classList.add('open');
}

function fillSalePrice() {
  const p=products.find(x=>x.id===document.getElementById('s-prod').value);
  if(p){document.getElementById('s-price').value=p.sell; calcTotal();}
}

function calcTotal() {
  const q=+document.getElementById('s-qty').value||0, pr=+document.getElementById('s-price').value||0, d=+document.getElementById('s-disc').value||0;
  document.getElementById('s-total').value=Math.max(0,q*pr-d).toFixed(0);
}

function saveSale() {
  const pid=document.getElementById('s-prod').value, qty=+document.getElementById('s-qty').value||0;
  const price=+document.getElementById('s-price').value||0, disc=+document.getElementById('s-disc').value||0;
  const note=document.getElementById('s-note').value.trim();
  const p=products.find(x=>x.id===pid);
  if(!p||qty<=0){alert('সঠিক তথ্য দিন');return;}
  if(p.stock<qty){alert(`স্টকে মাত্র ${p.stock} পিস আছে`);return;}
  const total=Math.max(0,qty*price-disc), profit=total-p.buy*qty;
  sales.push({id:Date.now().toString(),date:new Date().toISOString(),pid,pname:p.name,qty,price,buy:p.buy,disc,total,profit,note});
  p.stock-=qty; save(); closeModal('sale-modal'); renderDashboard();
}

function closeModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');editId=null;}
document.querySelectorAll('.backdrop').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===b)b.classList.remove('open');}));
renderDashboard();
</script>
</body>
</html>
"
